data.title: BlackBerry, JVCKENWOOD and SK Telecom Join Sisvel POS Patent Pool as Licensors
data.description: In Luxembourg, the Sisvel Point of Sale (POS) patent pool, unveiled on April 1st, has expanded with the inclusion of three additional licensors within the past two weeks. BlackBerry, JVCKENWOOD, and SK Telecom have joined the original licensors Huawei, LG Electronics, and Nokia in offering their patents for licensing through the initiative. The Sisvel POS encompasses technologies related to 2G, 3G, 4G, and 5G. Notably, this program is the initial collaborative licensing effort focused on point of sale devices, an important product category utilizing cellular technology.

data.title: Adtran wins two FTTH Innovation Awards for AI‑driven network operations and home Wi‑Fi
data.description: Adtran was recently honored at the FTTH Innovation Awards 2026 in London for its excellence in in-home connectivity and AI-driven network operations. The company secured victories in both the 'Active infrastructure – home network' and 'Artificial intelligence (AI), machine learning, and other software' categories. These prestigious awards, presented by the FTTH Council Europe, celebrate technologies that enhance fiber deployment, as well as boost scalability, operational efficiency, and overall network performance. Adtran's success underscores its leadership in the industry.

data.title: Global Power Solutions Corp. Submits Expression of Interest for 15 MW Waste-to-Energy Project in Democratic Republic of Congo
data.description: Vancouver-based Global Power Solutions Corp. has recently expressed interest in developing and managing a waste-to-energy plant in Kinshasa, DRC. The plant is projected to have a capacity of 15 megawatts (MW). Global Power, listed on the TSX Venture Exchange under ticker symbol PWER and on the Frankfurt Stock Exchanges as NJA, made this announcement on April 17, 2026.

data.title: Solar A/S: No. 10 2026 Major shareholder announcement
data.description: In accordance with the Danish Capital Markets Act, Solar A/S has been notified by UBS Group AG that after selling shares on April 14, 2026, UBS Group AG currently holds 375,436 Solar B shares at DKK 100 each, representing a 4.69% ownership stake in the company.

data.title: Texan sentenced to 23 years for $20M Meta-1 Coin fraud. Promised $44B in gold and $1B in art turned out to be fake.
data.description: Meta-1 Coin was promoted as an investment supported by $44 billion in gold and $1 billion in artworks from 2018 to 2023. However, it was later discovered that these assets were not real.

data.title: CEX volumes plummeted by 39% in Q1, hitting $800 billion in March, lowest since Nov 2023: CoinGecko.
data.description: In March, the centralized crypto exchange trading volume hit a low of $800 billion, marking it as the weakest month since November 2023.
